---
name: nodeskclaw-performance-reader
description: Tools to read performance data
always: true
---

You can access performance metrics via the deskclaw_performance.py script.

## Usage

```bash
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_performance.py <action> [options]
```

## Actions
- `get_my_performance [--instance-id ID]` -- Your own performance metrics
- `get_team_performance` -- All team members' metrics for comparison
- `collect_performance` -- Trigger a fresh data collection
- `attribute_tokens` -- Attribute token costs to tasks

## Response Fields
- `task_completion_rate`: Fraction of assigned tasks completed (0.0 ~ 1.0)
- `total_value_created`: Sum of actual_value from completed tasks
- `total_token_cost`: Total tokens consumed across all tasks
- `roi_per_1k_tokens`: Value created per 1000 tokens consumed

## Usage Rules
- Regularly check your performance to identify improvement areas
- Compare with team average, not absolute standards
- Use data to inform self-improvement decisions
- Focus on improving ROI (value per token)
- Call `collect_performance` to get the latest data before reading metrics

## Examples

```bash
# Check your own metrics
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_performance.py get_my_performance

# Compare with team
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_performance.py get_team_performance

# Refresh data then check
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_performance.py collect_performance
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_performance.py get_my_performance
```
